narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI-specific chips, data center networking, and related hardware continues to drive revenue for key semiconductor and equipment players as hyperscalers expand their AI capabilities.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth decelerates below 20% QoQ
China export controls expand to HBM or advanced packaging

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The market for GLP-1 obesity and related metabolic drugs continues to expand, driving significant revenue growth and R&D investment for leading pharmaceutical companies.
watchFor: New clinical trial data showing unexpected side effects for GLP-1s
Major insurance providers restrict coverage for GLP-1 drugs
A new, non-GLP-1 obesity drug shows superior efficacy

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Companies integrating AI agents and advanced AI capabilities into their software platforms are seeing increased adoption and revenue growth.
watchFor: Google/Microsoft AI product revenue growth slows unexpectedly
Enterprise AI adoption surveys show implementation challenges
New regulatory hurdles for AI agent deployment

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising Treasury yields are putting downward pressure on valuations across various sectors, particularly impacting growth stocks and those sensitive to higher borrowing costs.
watchFor: 10Y Treasury yield breaks below 4.2%
Federal Reserve signals dovish shift in monetary policy
Core CPI print falls below 0.2% MoM

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: Increased enterprise focus on AI-driven security threats and cloud migration continues to fuel demand for advanced cybersecurity solutions.
watchFor: Major breach at a leading cybersecurity vendor
Enterprise IT spending surveys show declining security budgets
New open-source security tools gain significant market share

narratives.name: Gold
narratives.thesis: Gold prices are under pressure from rising Treasury yields and a strengthening US dollar, as investors seek alternative inflation hedges and higher-yielding assets.
watchFor: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 4.2%
US Dollar Index (DXY) falls below 104
Federal Reserve signals rate cuts are imminent

narratives.name: Software Sector Rebound
narratives.thesis: After a period of valuation pressure, select software stocks are rebounding as investors re-evaluate growth prospects and AI integration opportunities.
watchFor: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.75%
Software earnings reports show widespread deceleration in ARR growth
Broad market risk-off sentiment returns

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Companies leveraging AI for content creation, search, and advertising are maintaining strong positions, while traditional media adapts to evolving consumer habits.
watchFor: Google Search ad revenue growth slows below 10%
Netflix subscriber additions miss estimates for two consecutive quarters
TikTok gains significant market share from established platforms

narratives.name: Logistics Efficiency & AI
narratives.thesis: Companies leveraging AI and strong operational execution in logistics are gaining an edge, benefiting from increased demand for efficient supply chains.
watchFor: Fuel prices spike, increasing operational costs for logistics companies
Global trade volumes decline unexpectedly
Major labor disputes in the freight industry

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified
narratives.thesis: Large diversified banks are demonstrating resilience through strategic engagements and consistent performance, attracting investor interest amidst broader market shifts.
watchFor: Major economic downturn leading to increased loan defaults
Unexpected regulatory action against large banks
Net interest margins compress significantly

narratives.name: Internet Retail Volatility
narratives.thesis: The internet retail sector faces mixed signals, with some platforms showing strong performance and strategic growth, while others navigate competitive pressures and valuation concerns.
watchFor: Amazon reports stronger-than-expected Q2 retail growth
E-commerce penetration rates stagnate or decline
New regulatory scrutiny on gig economy platforms

narratives.name: Healthcare Plan Scrutiny
narratives.thesis: Healthcare plans and PBMs face increased regulatory and investor scrutiny, leading to potential headwinds and shifts in market positioning.
watchFor: New federal legislation targeting PBM practices
Major employers switch healthcare plan providers due to cost concerns
UNH reports stronger-than-expected Q2 earnings and guidance

narratives.name: Fintech & Payments Innovation
narratives.thesis: Companies innovating in digital payments and financial technology are benefiting from increased adoption and strategic partnerships, despite broader market volatility.
watchFor: New regulations significantly impacting transaction fees
Major data breach at a leading fintech company
Competition from central bank digital currencies intensifies

narratives.name: Aerospace Safety & Delivery Woes
narratives.thesis: The aerospace sector faces scrutiny over maintenance lapses and delivery delays, impacting investor confidence despite ongoing defense spending.
watchFor: NTSB closes investigation with no further action against UPS
Major aerospace manufacturers report significant improvements in delivery schedules
New government contracts for defense logistics providers

narratives.name: AI Data Center Competition
narratives.thesis: Increased competition in the AI cloud and data center infrastructure space, with new partnerships and offerings challenging established players.
watchFor: Google/Blackstone JV announces major customer wins
NVIDIA's market share in AI compute begins to erode
SMCI reports significant inventory build or capex challenges

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver, with hyperscalers and enterprises investing heavily in AI infrastructure and software. While some chip stocks are seeing profit-taking, the underlying demand for AI-related hardware and software remains robust, supported by new product launches and strategic partnerships.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Core CPI print > 0.4% MoM for two consecutive months — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, hurting growth multiples
Major AI chip or software vendor misses revenue guidance by >10% due to demand issues

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer spending remains resilient in some areas like travel and online retail, but discretionary spending on apparel and home improvement is showing signs of caution. Inflationary pressures on car care and energy costs could impact broader consumer sentiment.
watchFor: Retail sales data shows significant deceleration (<0.2% MoM)
Consumer confidence index drops below 95
Gasoline prices break above $4/gallon nationally

Communication Services.thesis: Digital content and advertising continue to evolve with AI integration, driving some positive sentiment. However, traditional entertainment faces ongoing challenges and competitive pressures.
watchFor: Major digital ad spend reports show deceleration
Streaming subscriber growth for leading platforms turns negative
New antitrust action against major tech platforms

Industrials.thesis: Defense spending remains a tailwind, but the broader industrials sector faces mixed signals with some companies navigating valuation concerns and others benefiting from specific growth drivers. Logistics are under scrutiny due to operational issues.
watchFor: Global manufacturing PMI drops below 50 for two consecutive months
Major defense contract cancellations or delays
Significant increase in global trade protectionism

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive innovation and market interest, but the broader healthcare sector faces challenges from PBM scrutiny and shifts in investor sentiment for certain segments.
watchFor: FDA approval for a new, highly effective GLP-1 competitor
Major legislative action impacting PBMs or drug pricing
Healthcare spending growth decelerates below 3% annually

Financials.thesis: Major banks are benefiting from strategic initiatives and strong capital positions, with some showing resilience. However, rising Treasury yields are creating valuation pressure across the broader financial sector, particularly for growth-oriented segments.
watchFor: Federal Reserve signals rate cuts are imminent
Major bank reports significant increase in loan loss provisions
10Y Treasury yield drops below 4.0%

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The discount retail sector is navigating a cautious consumer environment, with upcoming earnings reports serving as key catalysts. Broader inflation concerns could impact consumer spending habits.
watchFor: Walmart or Costco report significant slowdown in same-store sales growth
Consumer Price Index (CPI) shows sustained decline in food prices
Unemployment rate rises above 4.5%

Precious Metals.thesis: Gold and silver are facing headwinds from rising Treasury yields and a stronger US dollar, as inflation concerns drive investors towards other hedges like Bitcoin. Geopolitical uncertainty provides some underlying support but is currently outweighed by macro factors.
watchFor: US Dollar Index (DXY) drops below 102
10Y Treasury yield falls below 4.0%
Significant escalation in geopolitical tensions (e.g., Middle East conflict)

macroHeadlines.title: My late mother’s bank account is $2,000 short. Can the bank legally refuse to provide her final statement?
I’m selling my $1 million Maui home. Will my agent charge me less than a 6% commission?
Are businesses passing on higher energy costs to their customers? Fed minutes may have the answer.
SpaceX picks Goldman Sachs for lead left position on record-breaking IPO, sources say
Senate advances measure to end military action in Iran in rebuke to Trump
‘Makes a lot of sense’: UBS is bullish on China tech stocks as AI ecosystem grows
Buckle up for $120 oil changes. Why car care is about to get more expensive.
These charts offer a warning: A new era of higher Treasury yields may be coming
Here’s why Astera Labs’ stock just staged a big gain
Trump's past tax returns get protection from IRS enforcement under 'lawfare' fund settlement
Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
Vance defends stock-trading spree in Trump financial filings: 'Come on, man'
SEC Proposes Transformative Reforms to Help Public Companies Conduct Registered Offerings and Simplify Reporting Requirements
SEC Rescinds Policy Regarding Denials of Settlements in Enforcement Actions
PPI for final demand advances 1.4% in April; services rise 1.2%, goods increase 2.0%
CPI for all items rises 0.6% in April; shelter and gasoline up
Payroll employment edges up by 115,000 in April; unemployment rate unchanged at 4.3%
SEC Charges 21 Individuals With Alleged Wide-Reaching Insider Trading Scheme
Federal Reserve Board names Jerome H. Powell as chair pro tempore; Powell will serve as chair pro tempore until Kevin M. Warsh is sworn in as the new chair
Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by the Stephen M. Calk 2025 Trust

Federal Reserve Board announces it does not object to the conversion of United Texas Bank, of Dallas, Texas, from a bank supervised by the Federal Reserve to a national bank supervised by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement actions with UBS Group AG, Credit Suisse AG, Credit Suisse Holdings (USA), Inc., and Credit Suisse AG, New York Branch
Stephen I. Miran submits his resignation as a member of the Federal Reserve Board, effective when or shortly before his successor on the Board is sworn in

Federal Reserve Board releases results from two surveys of senior financial officers at banks about their views on discount window operating days and their strategies and practices for managing reserve balances
